prompt: Do professors with higher academic titles give different grades?

inputData.question: Do professors with higher academic titles give different grades?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Do professors with higher academic titles give different grades?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Do professors with higher academic titles give different grades?"},"startedAt":1771804386462,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Compute and compare numeric grade components by professor academic_title using joins confirmed in the schema. I aggregate exam/project/attendance scores and a per-grade composite (average of available numeric components) per academic title, ordering by composite score to show differences.","sql":"SELECT
  COALESCE(p.academic_title, 'Unknown') AS academic_title,
  COUNT(g.id) AS grade_count,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.project_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_project_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_attendance_score,
  ROUND(
    AVG(
      CASE
        WHEN (
          (CASE WHEN g.exam_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.project_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        ) > 0
        THEN (
          COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)
        )::numeric / NULLIF(
          (CASE WHEN g.exam_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.project_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0
        )
        ELSE NULL
      END
    )::numeric, 2
  ) AS avg_overall_score
FROM public.professors p
JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.professor_id = p.id
JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
GROUP BY COALESCE(p.academic_title, 'Unknown')
ORDER BY avg_overall_score DESC NULLS LAST","assumptions":["grade numeric components (exam_score, project_score, attendance_score) are meaningful proxies for final grade when grade_value is not numeric","academic_title text values are the intended grouping (NULLs labeled 'Unknown')","no minimum sample-size filter applied (small groups will appear)"]},"endedAt":1771804427836},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT
  COALESCE(p.academic_title, 'Unknown') AS academic_title,
  COUNT(g.id) AS grade_count,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.project_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_project_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_attendance_score,
  ROUND(
    AVG(
      CASE
        WHEN (
          (CASE WHEN g.exam_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.project_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        ) > 0
        THEN (
          COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)
        )::numeric / NULLIF(
          (CASE WHEN g.exam_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.project_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0
        )
        ELSE NULL
      END
    )::numeric, 2
  ) AS avg_overall_score
FROM public.professors p
JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.professor_id = p.id
JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
GROUP BY COALESCE(p.academic_title, 'Unknown')
ORDER BY avg_overall_score DESC NULLS LAST"},"startedAt":1771804427841,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"SELECT

  COALESCE(p.academic_title, 'Unknown') AS academic_title,
  COUNT(g.id) AS grade_count,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.project_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_project_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_attendance_score,
  ROUND(
    AVG(
      CASE
        WHEN (
          (CASE WHEN g.exam_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.project_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        ) > 0
        THEN (
          COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)
        )::numeric / NULLIF(
          (CASE WHEN g.exam_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.project_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0
        )
        ELSE NULL
      END
    )::numeric, 2
  ) AS avg_overall_score
FROM public.professors p
JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.professor_id = p.id
JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
GROUP BY COALESCE(p.academic_title, 'Unknown')
ORDER BY avg_overall_score DESC NULLS title.text: Average overall score by professors' academic title
title.subtitle: Bar length = avg overall score. Color = avg exam score. Hover for counts and component averages.

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(p.academic_title, 'Unknown') AS academic_title,
  COUNT(g.id) AS grade_count,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.project_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_project_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_attendance_score,
  ROUND(
    AVG(
      CASE
        WHEN (
          (CASE WHEN g.exam_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.project_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        ) > 0
        THEN (
          COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)
        )::numeric / NULLIF(
          (CASE WHEN g.exam_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.project_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0
        )
        ELSE NULL
      END
    )::numeric, 2
  ) AS avg_overall_score
FROM public.professors p
JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.professor_id = p.id
JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
GROUP BY COALESCE(p.academic_title, 'Unknown')
ORDER BY avg_overall_score DESC NULLS LAST

title.text: Average overall score by professors' academic title
title.subtitle: Bar length = avg overall score. Color = avg exam score. Hover for counts and component averages.

result.sql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(p.academic_title, 'Unknown') AS academic_title,
  COUNT(g.id) AS grade_count,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.project_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_project_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_attendance_score,
  ROUND(
    AVG(
      CASE
        WHEN (
          (CASE WHEN g.exam_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.project_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        ) > 0
        THEN (
          COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)
        )::numeric / NULLIF(
          (CASE WHEN g.exam_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.project_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
          (CASE WHEN g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0
        )
        ELSE NULL
      END
    )::numeric, 2
  ) AS avg_overall_score
FROM public.professors p
JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.professor_id = p.id
JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
GROUP BY COALESCE(p.academic_title, 'Unknown')
ORDER BY avg_overall_score DESC NULLS LAST
